title: Destroyer Zombies
description: Makes all zombies able to destroy doors.
body:
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ZKlI1BZf?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Downloads&color=%2319c819) ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1242212171472048288?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&color=%23266fff)

Makes it so all zombies are able to break doors (5% of zombies in vanilla). **You must be on hard difficulty** for them to be able to succeed.

![Zombie destroying door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZKlI1BZf/images/e5c25a4571984b3f055d35ebff3eaaf0dc8acb6f.png)
### Note
**Don't expect many updates** as there's not much you can add to a datapack like this. I will try my best to update it to newer versions.
